description.en: A crusty Iraqi bread with a fluffy interior, hand-shaped into a torpedo or diamond with thin tapered ends and a thick center. Baked hot on a stone until deep gold, then split open for kebab, falafel or a smear of cheese and tea on the side.
description.de: Ein knuspriges irakisches Brot mit lockerer Krume, von Hand zu einer Torpedo- oder Rautenform mit dünnen Enden und dickerer Mitte geformt. Heiß auf dem Stein gebacken bis tief golden, dann aufgeschnitten für Kebab, Falafel oder mit Käse zum Tee.
description.es: Un pan iraquí crujiente de miga esponjosa, formado a mano en torpedo o rombo con puntas finas y centro más grueso. Se hornea muy caliente sobre piedra hasta dorarse profundamente y se abre para rellenar con kebab, falafel o queso y té.
description.fr: Un pain irakien croustillant à la mie moelleuse, façonné à la main en torpille ou en losange, avec des extrémités fines et un centre épais. Cuit très chaud sur pierre jusqu'à devenir bien doré, puis fendu pour le kebab, le falafel ou le fromage et le thé.

origin.note: The name traces to Turkish somun, itself from Greek psomos ('bread'); the modern diamond shape is credited to 20th-century Baghdad bakers.

ingredients.note: wheat bran, whisked into the flour
warm, about 37°C, for blooming the yeast and mixing
beaten with vinegar, for the egg wash

keeping.note: Best the day it is baked while the crust is crisp; freezes well and refreshes in a hot oven.

method.title: Bloom yeast
method.summary: Stir yeast and sugar into part of the warm water and let stand about 10 minutes until foamy.

method.title: Mix
method.summary: Whisk flour and wheat bran in a mixer bowl, add the yeast mixture, oil and buttermilk, and knead about 7 minutes, working in the rest of the water and then the salt until smooth.

method.title: First rise
method.summary: Cover and let the dough double in a warm spot, about 1 hour.

method.title: Shape
method.summary: Divide into 6 pieces and rest 15 minutes, then roll each into a cylinder and work the ends thin between your palms, leaving the center thick, to form a diamond.

method.title: Second rise
method.summary: Cover and let rest about 30 minutes.

method.title: Bake
method.summary: Brush with the egg-vinegar wash, sprinkle sesame seeds, and bake on a preheated stone with a pan of boiling water below for steam, until golden, 15 to 18 minutes.

source.adaptation: Weights converted from cups/tablespoons; wheat bran folded into the flour total as a small wholegrain share; the bowl of water used only for oven steam is omitted.
